discobot.description: Discord Synth Bot project for music creation with Web UI and Discord integration

discobot-developer.description: Helps develop, debug, and enhance the Discord Synth Bot with web UI and audio synthesis features

dev.template: Start all services in the discobot monorepo. Use this when you need to run the Discord bot, web API server, WebSocket server, and React UI together. The command should start: 1) Discord bot (connects to Discord), 2) Web API Server on http://localhost:3001, 3) WebSocket Server on ws://localhost:8080, 4) Web UI on http://localhost:3000. How to properly run this?
